The '''''Azure Angel''''' was a unique customized [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 ''Aethersprite''-class light interceptor]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] that was modified and piloted by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] during the early months of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Characteristics==
Even though Anakin Skywalker led an army in the Clone Wars as a [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]], he still had within him the boy who restored and rebuilt a junked Podracer and piloted it to victory. Although ''Azure Angel'' began its life as a standard Delta-7, Anakin, with his innate mechanical aptitude and being dissatisfied with the Delta-7's performance, made extensive mechanical and aerodynamic modifications to enhance the starfighter's performance in order to suit his own tastes for speed and control while in flight and in [[Starfighter combat/Legends|combat]]. Anakin gave his ship a paint scheme similar to that of his [[Anakin Skywalker's Podracer/Legends|old]] [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]] and designed it after his dream speeder.<ref name="AJJ">''[[Anakin Skywalker: A Jedi's Journal]]''</ref> This paint scheme was also later applied to the ''[[Blade of Dorin/Legends|Blade of Dorin]]'', which Anakin subsequently gifted to [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Plo Koon/Legends|Plo Koon]] during the [[Plo Koon/Legends#The Malevolence crisis|''Malevolence'' crisis]].<ref name="EpGuide201">{{SWArchive|url=theclonewars/guide/episode201.html|text=''The Clone Wars'' Episode Guide: Holocron Heist}}</ref> ''Azure Angel'' was named out of Anakin's love for his secret wife, [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]].

[[File:Azure_Angel.jpg|thumb|left|180px|''Azure Angel'' lifts off from Coruscant.]]

To enhance the ship's firepower, he armed it with four [[Taim & Bak/Legends|Taim & Bak]] [[KX9 laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], mounting two on each wingtip, as well as a missile launcher installed in the center fuselage, which held a very high number of missiles. The laser cannons on each wingtip could fire either separately or simultaneously, and at such extreme angles off-axis that they could hit targets even as Anakin passed them.

The missiles could be launched in rapid succession; seven of them were fired within the span of seconds at the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]]. Other modifications included an increase to engine power, articulated stabilizer foils and vectored thrusters for increased maneuverability within [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]] and [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheres]], as well as a pair of [[TransGalMeg Industries, Incorporated|TransGalMeg]] [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] thrusters that provided [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] capability without having to utilize a [[Hyperspace transport ring/Legends|hyperdrive ring]].

==History==
[[File:Clonewars_ch11.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Anakin piloting the ''Azure Angel'' against [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]]' [[Ginivex-class starfighter/Legends|Fanblade]].]]
Some [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] were concerned that Skywalker regarded this fighter as a possession, and that it was a sign of his inability to let go of his past or to resist forming attachments. However, [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]] encouraged him to keep pushing the ship's limits, hoping to see that Anakin's improvements were incorporated into the next generation of Jedi starfighters.

The original ''Azure Angel'' was used up until the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]]. After destroying numerous [[Nantex-class territorial defense starfighter/Legends|Geonosian fighters]] and a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[InterGalactic Banking Clan gun platform/Legends|gun platform]], Anakin encountered [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]], who dueled him using her [[Ginivex-class starfighter/Legends|''Ginivex''-class starfighter]]. When the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] retreated, Anakin chased her to the jungle moon of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], where she destroyed the ''Azure Angel'' after he had landed. Following this, Skywalker would go on to pilot several other starfighters, including a number of [[Anakin Skywalker's Delta-7B Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|yellow Delta-7B's]], a [[Anakin Skywalker's red Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor|red Delta-7]], another blue Delta-7 named ''[[Azure Angel II]]'', and at least two [[Anakin Skywalker's Eta-2 Actis-class interceptor/Legends|yellow Eta-2 ''Actis'']].

==Behind the scenes==
*The name ''Azure Angel'' was created by [[Lucasfilm]]'s "Keeper of the [[Holocron continuity database|Holocron]]," [[Leland Chee]], based on the [[Wikipedia:United States Navy|U.S. Navy's]] [[Wikipedia:Blue Angels|Blue Angels]] precision flight team. Other possible names were ''Cerulean Angel'', ''Cobalt Angel'', and ''Teal Angel''.
*A LEGO version of the fighter (LEGO STAR WARS - 75087 Anakin's Custom Jedi Starfighter) was released in 2015.
